---
title: ""
---

# Hi, I’m Roopa ☁️

<div class="intro">
A visual analytics journey presented in a wholesome space 🐾
</div>

![](Images/snoopy-main.png){class="snoopy-img"}

---

## 🌼 Explore

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4 .card}
### 🧪 Hands-on Exercises
Guided practice and learning  

[View →](Hands-on_Ex/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .card}
### 🏠 Take-home Exercises
Assignments and deeper work  

[View →](Take-home_Ex/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .card}
### 🏫 In-class Exercises
Session-based work  

[View →](In-class_Ex/index.qmd)
:::

:::

---

<div class="footer-note">
built with ☁️ and snoopy!
</div>
